name: construction contractors managing 5–10 projects/month tool
description: For construction contractors processing 5–10 projects/month, inefficient material ordering causes late orders. We automate material ordering and scheduling instead of manual tracking and ordering processes.
problem_solved: Inefficient material ordering and scheduling from construction plans.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inefficient material ordering and scheduling from construction plans.

one_liner: For construction contractors processing 5–10 projects/month, inefficient material ordering causes late orders. We automate material ordering and scheduling instead of manual tracking and ordering processes.
